messages.speaker: A
messages.text: Hey! I love board games too, what's your fav board game?

messages.speaker: B
messages.text: Have you ever played lords of waterdeep?

messages.speaker: A
messages.text: Nooo but I've seen it at board game cafes! Right now my fav is dominion but it would be Arcs if I could find people to play with lol

messages.speaker: A
messages.text: Oh what? It's like one of those silent games? My fav in that genre is probably Mysterium

messages.speaker: A
messages.text: Also you said you like sports? Any interest in WNBA?

messages.speaker: A
messages.text: Oh like on here? This app gets overwhelming, actually a huge texter lol

messages.speaker: A
messages.text: Sorry for offending you :( good luck!

messages.speaker: A
messages.text: Hey I usually don't defend myself when some stranger accuses me of something like that, but like we don't know each other, we have lives, and we have never even met in person. I don't think you have realistic expectations from someone who you don't know at all. I hope you're less rude to the next person you talk to

messages.speaker: A
messages.text: And a shit ton of freckles

messages.speaker: A
messages.text: And she's not even that mean

messages.speaker: A
messages.text: And il be honest I think even you look prettier than her

messages.speaker: A
messages.text: Take that as you want I think she's mid

messages.speaker: A
messages.text: By her I mean that red haired girl

messages.speaker: A
messages.text: I love you and this is another way your mental illness is hurting me

messages.speaker: B
messages.text: I love you as so very much. I will phone <NAME> office next week to make an appointment for help.

messages.speaker: B
messages.text: Don't thank me. I have done absolutely nothing

messages.speaker: A
messages.text: Well thank you for saying you'll make an appointment to get help

messages.speaker: B
messages.text: okay. once again, I love you

messages.speaker: B
messages.text: I hope you are having a good boxing day, and once again I am so sorry.

messages.speaker: A
messages.text: Thank you!! And I know you are

messages.speaker: A
messages.text: Do you have anything after 8pm between today and Friday? Forgot my Grandma's wedding is Saturday. 😭

messages.speaker: B
messages.text: Hey boo yea im tryna figure out when you have you come in. Im thinking tonight because <NAME> is getting short simple nails and toes so im thinking I will finish her faster

messages.speaker: B
messages.text: But are you able to be on standby if I can tonight

messages.speaker: A
messages.text: Yes! I'm off at 3:30, so I can make whatever work need be. Just need like a 30 minute warning

messages.speaker: A
messages.text: I got super stressed and upset last week and destroyed my nails 😭

messages.speaker: A
messages.text: i think i have t mobile

messages.speaker: B
messages.text: totally i think it's right up your alley

messages.speaker: B
messages.text: i like to play the little contest games and get my hopes up that i'll win something but i never do 🥲

messages.speaker: B
messages.text: it means i think you'd like it!

messages.speaker: B
messages.text: but if you don't, that's also cool hehe

messages.speaker: A
messages.text: i feel like u just say stuff and then it throws u off when i ask why u said it

messages.speaker: B
messages.text: there's nothing wrong with you asking why if you're unsure why i said something

messages.speaker: B
messages.text: i don't usually 'just say stuff' tho lol i'm too much of an overthinker but i also have adhd so sometimes i really do just say stuff

messages.speaker: A
messages.text: ig im saying u always give a weird answer

messages.speaker: A
messages.text: for example: 'i don't usually just say stuff' 'sometimes i really do just say stuff'

messages.speaker: A
messages.text: hi :) it's kylie from art class. i really appreciate your note, it was super sweet but i like girls 🙃 thank you for the thought tho. friends instead?

messages.speaker: A
messages.text: no don't be!! it's okay lmao

messages.speaker: A
messages.text: Why are you telling ppl i'm ya baby father

messages.speaker: A
messages.text: Wanna know the difference between me and Jesus?

messages.speaker: B
messages.text: you'll let me sleep in on sundays?!

messages.speaker: A
messages.text: Do you want the clean answer or the dirty version? 😅

messages.speaker: B
messages.text: i really don't care which one lol

messages.speaker: A
messages.text: Jesus was full of Grace, whereas grace is about to be full of me.

messages.speaker: B
messages.text: Bro we're actually retarded I swear

messages.speaker: A
messages.text: Is this is how you are in person hahaha

messages.speaker: B
messages.text: Finally smbd not talking about miles

messages.speaker: A
messages.text: let's get drinks and chat shit about americans?

messages.speaker: B
messages.text: Omggggg you know hpw to seduce women

messages.speaker: A
messages.text: If you're not in bed already can you put your skateboard by the door?

messages.speaker: B
messages.text: i can do that tomorrow morning tho :3

messages.speaker: A
messages.text: You sleep at your aunt's house when dog sitting?

messages.speaker: A
messages.text: Don't sit on them to long

messages.speaker: A
messages.text: I'm the dog you're supposed to sit on

messages.speaker: B
messages.text: My birthday is 15 August you dummy

messages.speaker: A
messages.text: My birthday is 17 May you dummy

messages.speaker: B
messages.text: the joke was that i'm bad in bed

messages.speaker: A
messages.text: let's go through those highlights (pretty soon i'll be in them)

messages.speaker: A
messages.text: 'this was the worst experience of my life, i hate you'
